class.name: diff_drive_hardware/DiffDriveHardware
class.description: Differential-drive hardware interface plugin. Bridges the ros2_control controller_manager to RPM-based motor driver topics: reads /drive_rpm (Float32MultiArray [left_rpm, right_rpm]) writes /cmd_rpm (Float32MultiArray [left_rpm, right_rpm]) Kinematic parameters (wheel_radius, wheel_separation, gear_ratio) come from the URDF hardware block.
